activationDefinition.description: A business activates when it sends its first successful invoice or executes its first successful workflow.

steps.label: Business profile
steps.description: Capture enough business context to pre-configure the workspace.

steps.label: Template generation
steps.description: Generate invoice and WhatsApp defaults automatically.

steps.label: Menu import
steps.description: Import or manually add sellable items for invoicing.

steps.label: WhatsApp connection
steps.description: Connect or deliberately skip the messaging channel.

steps.label: First invoice
steps.description: Create and send the first invoice to trigger activation.

whatsapp.name: Menu request
whatsapp.response: Ini menu kami. Balas dengan nama item dan kuantiti, contohnya 'Nasi Lemak 2, Teh Tarik 1'.

whatsapp.name: Order confirmation
whatsapp.response: Terima kasih. Kami sedang siapkan order anda dan invois akan dihantar sebentar lagi.

whatsapp.name: Business hours
whatsapp.response: Kami buka setiap hari 9 pagi hingga 9 malam. Nak tengok menu? Balas MENU.
